title: NvmMetadata label field access pattern undiscoverable
description: nvm.rs: NvmMetadata.label is a public [u8; 24] field. The struct-level doc does not mention that label contains NUL-terminated bytes or that label_str() is the correct way to read it as text. A contributor who accesses .label directly will see NUL-padded bytes and may not realise label_str() exists. Add a doc comment on the label field directing readers to label_str(), and note that the field is NUL-padded (not NUL-terminated in the C sense — it may contain no NUL if the full 24 bytes are used).
